GN[19x19 ladder challenge: hilbert90 vs cerisara]

C[cerisara: I'm sorry, I just can't get how I could have done such a big mistake ! :-) Well, in fact, yes, it was a pretty smart double attack, and I was may be sure to loose eithr one or the other... But maybe there is a way out of it ? I'll have to take a closer look at it... Anyway, thanks a lot for this ""demonstration"", it's really an interesting and exciting play !! Thanks for the game !
hilbert90: When I revived that stone as compensation for losing the ko I knew there was danger there, but I didn't realize it could be used quite so well when I start the attack

cerisara: After a bit of review myself, I think I was clerly too eager, because I defended first the 3 stones at B16, and then the two stones at G14. This was so stupid, and I should have let you take profit (say the 2 stones) after the ko finished.
